name: Cushman & Wakefield Ltd.
business: Cushman & Wakefield is a leading global commercial real estate services firm providing problem-solving, advisory, and execution for occupiers and investors. The company offers services across (i) Services (property management, facilities management, project management), (ii) Leasing, (iii) Capital markets (sale and financing of real estate), and (iv) Valuation and other. As of December 31, 2025, it had approximately 53,000 employees in over 350 offices and nearly 60 countries, managing approximately 6.5 billion square feet of commercial real estate.

exposures.sentence: Our clients include a full range of real estate occupiers and investors, including tenants, investors and multinational companies in numerous markets, including office, industrial, logistics, multifamily, retail, data centers, life-sciences, healthcare, student housing, self-storage, land and special use.

A security breach or other threat relating to our information systems could lead to confidential information being exposed which could increase the risk of liability and damage our reputation.

catalysts.sentence: On November 27, 2025, Cushman & Wakefield plc completed a court-approved scheme of arrangement in the U.K., pursuant to which a new Bermudan holding company, Cushman & Wakefield Ltd. became the sole shareholder of Cushman & Wakefield plc and the parent company of the entire group of Cushman & Wakefield companies (the Redomiciliation).

catalysts.event: Expected completion of buy-out for at least one U.K. defined benefit pension plan
catalysts.sentence: The Company anticipates that it is reasonably possible the buy-out process for at least one of the U.K. defined benefit plans will be completed in 2026, at which time the insurance company would assume full responsibility to pay the pension benefit obligations.
